§6Illuminated Panels§f:
The §6Illuminated Panels §fare §edecorative cable parts§f that emit light and can change colour based on the §bstate of a network §f or §bredstone power§f. They are the primary way to add §6lighting §f to ME networks and signal §6state §f visually.

§6Panel Family§f:
- §bBright Illuminated Panel §f(appliedenergistics2:part:160) — full-bright, used by §6ME Storage Monitor §f
- §bIlluminated Panel §f(appliedenergistics2:part:180) — medium-bright, default
- §bDark Illuminated Panel §f(appliedenergistics2:part:200) — dim, used by §6ME Conversion Monitor §f
- §bME Terminal §f(appliedenergistics2:part:380) — terminal part that lights up when active
- §bME Crafting Terminal §f(appliedenergistics2:part:360) — variant of the ME Terminal
- §bME Pattern Terminal §f(appliedenergistics2:part:340) — variant of the ME Terminal

§6Production Path (network/parts/panels_semi_dark_monitor.json)§f:
The §6Illuminated Panel §frecipe is pattern " ab / cdb / ab " (3x3 with centre + diagonals + edges):
- §ba§f: §6Glowstone Dust §f (dustGlowstone) — 4
- §bb§f: §6Quartz Glass §f (appliedenergistics2:quartz_glass) — 4
- §cc§f: §6Iron Ingot §f (ingotIron) — 1
- §cd§f: §6Redstone Dust §f (dustRedstone) — 1 (at the centre)
- Yields 3× Illuminated Panel

The §6Bright §fvariant (§6panels_dark_monitor.json §f) upgrades via shapeless from the standard panel.
The §6Dark §fvariant upgrades via shapeless from the Bright variant (and vice versa).

§6Function (PartPanel.java:31-56)§f:
- §bLight emission §f: panels emit §blight level 15 §f when powered
- §bColour tinting §f: each panel can be §6dyed §f to one of 16 §eDye §fcolours, matching the §6ME Cable §f colour palette
- §bState visualisation §f: panels on a §6working §f network show §bsteady light §f; panels on a §cno-power §f network are §bdark §f
- §bNo network function §f: panels do §cnot §f transmit channels, power, or items — they are §6pure decoration §f and a §bredstone output §f

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 29 items the Illuminated Panel is a component of, including:
- §6ME Storage Monitor §f(appliedenergistics2:part:400) — combines a Level Emitter with two panel variants
- §6ME Terminal §f and its crafting/pattern variants
- §6ME Crafting Terminal §f
- §6ME Pattern Terminal §f
- §6ME Fluid Terminal §f
- §6ME Wireless Terminal §f family

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: place an §6Illuminated Panel §f on every §6ME Controller §f face for a §6status indicator §f — bright when powered, dim when offline
- §eTip§f: use §6Dark Illuminated Panels §f as a §6low-power §f alternative to Glowstone for ambient lighting
- §cWarning§f: panels consume §bno AE/t §f and provide §bno channels §f; they cannot be §bcable anchors §f
- §cWarning§f: when a panel is §6dyed §f, the §6brightness §f is preserved, but the colour may not match §6Vanilla §f stained glass exactly
